title: Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram
tagline: Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sree Rama temple, Ramapuram is a Hindu temple situated at Ramapuram, between Malappuram and Perinthalmanna in Kerala state, India.
overview.description: Sree Rama temple, Ramapuram is a Hindu temple situated at Ramapuram, between Malappuram and Perinthalmanna in Kerala state, India. The temple is dedicated to the god Rama. There are shrines for Ganapathi, Sastha and Hanuman too in this temple.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram, Malappuram
topPlaces.description: Ramapuram is a suburb of Malappuram in the Indian state of Kerala. Ramapuram is 10 km from the district HQ city Malappuram towards Palakkad on National Highway-966.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkangara, Manjeri
topPlaces.description: Vadakkangara is a village in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kuruva, Malappuram
topPlaces.description: Kuruva is a village in Perinthalmanna Taluk, Malappuram District, Kerala, India. It is located along the National Highway 966, about 6 kilometres southeast of the district seat Malappuram, and 13 kilometres northwest of the taluk seat Perinthalmanna.

topPlaces.name: Puzhakkattiri
topPlaces.description: Puzhakkattiri is a village in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Paloor Kotta Falls
topPlaces.description: Paloor Kotta Falls is a waterfall in Kadungapuram village of Malappuram district in Kerala, India. It is situated 7 kilometres away from Angadipuram and 10 kilometres away from Perinthalmanna town.

topPlaces.name: Aripra
topPlaces.description: Aripra (Malayalam: അരിപ്ര) is a village in India located between the villages of Mankada and Tirurkkad, in Malappuram district, Kerala. National Highway No.966 passes through the center of this village.

topPlaces.name: Mankada
topPlaces.description: Mankada is a hillside village in the Malappuram district of Kerala state. It is located 15 km (9.3 mi) from Malappuram and is part of the Malappuram parliament constituency.

topPlaces.name: Cherukulamba
topPlaces.description: Cherukulamba is a village in Malappuram district of Kerala state, south India. It is 9 km from Malappuram town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Rama Temple, Ramapuram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramapuram, Malappuram, Vadakkangara, Manjeri, Kuruva, Malappuram, Puzhakkattiri, Paloor Kotta Falls.
